entities.teacher: a teacher pointing at the whiteboard

scenes.title: The Spelling Lesson
scenes.background_prompt: A classroom with a whiteboard at the front showing a sentence, a teacher's desk, student desks in rows, and educational posters. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A bright classroom during a lesson. A teacher in a button-down shirt and slacks stands at the front, pointing with a marker at a sentence written in large clear letters on the whiteboard. The sentence reads: 'The dogs is playing in the park.' A student — a girl of about nine with a raised hand and an eager expression — sits at a front desk, clearly having spotted the error. Other students sit at their desks in rows behind her. Educational posters about grammar and vocabulary decorate the walls. A teacher's desk with a mug and papers sits to the side. The fluorescent lights are bright and the room feels active and engaged.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place teacher at the front, standing and pointing with a marker at a sentence on the whiteboard. Place student at a front desk, sitting with raised hand and eager expression. Other students at desks behind her.
